languages.text: {n}Портрет сохраняет молчание. Возможно, потому что он, несмотря на живость изображенного человека — лишь предмет, висящий на этой стене уже несколько столетий.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Портрет сохраняет молчание. Возможно, потому что он — лишь неживой предмет, висящий на этой стене уже несколько столетий?{/n}

languages.text: {n}The portrait remains silent. Perhaps because, despite the vividness of the person depicted, it is only an object that has been hanging on this wall for centuries.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Портрет сохраняет молчание. Возможно, потому что он, несмотря на живость изображенного человека — лишь предмет, висящий на этой стене уже несколько столетий.{/n}

{n}The portrait remains silent. Perhaps because, despite the vividness of the person depicted, it is only an object that has been hanging on this wall for centuries.{/n}
{n}The portrait remains silent. Perhaps because, despite the vividness of the person depicted, it is only an object that has been hanging on this wall for centuries.{/n}

languages.text: 肖像画は沈黙を守っている。描かれた人物がどれほど生き生きしていようとも、それは何世紀もこの壁に掛けられてきたただの物にすぎないからかもしれない。
languages.original_text: {n}The portrait remains silent. Perhaps because, despite the vividness of the person depicted, it is only an object that has been hanging on this wall for centuries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 肖像画は沈黙を守っている。描かれた人物がどれほど生き生きしていようとも、それは何世紀もこの壁に掛けられてきたただの物にすぎないからかもしれない。

languages.text: {n}Le portrait garde le silence. Peut-être parce que, malgré son réalisme saisissant, ce n'est qu'un simple tableau accroché à ce mur depuis des siècles.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The portrait remains silent. Perhaps because, despite the vividness of the person depicted, it is only an object that has been hanging on this wall for centuries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le portrait garde le silence. Peut-être parce que, malgré son réalisme saisissant, ce n'est qu'un simple tableau accroché à ce mur depuis des siècles.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Portre sessizliğini bozmuyor. Tasvir edilen kişinin canlılığına rağmen yüzyıllardır bu duvarda asılı duran bir nesne olduğu için olabilir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The portrait remains silent. Perhaps because, despite the vividness of the person depicted, it is only an object that has been hanging on this wall for centuries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Portre sessizliğini bozmuyor. Tasvir edilen kişinin canlılığına rağmen yüzyıllardır bu duvarda asılı duran bir nesne olduğu için olabilir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das Porträt schweigt. Vermutlich, weil es trotz der Lebendigkeit der dargestellten Person nur ein Bild ist, das seit Jahrhunderten an dieser Wand hängt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The portrait remains silent. Perhaps because, despite the vividness of the person depicted, it is only an object that has been hanging on this wall for centuries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das Porträt schweigt. Vermutlich, weil es trotz der Lebendigkeit der dargestellten Person nur ein Bild ist, das seit Jahrhunderten an dieser Wand hängt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El retrato guarda silencio. Probablemente porque, a pesar de lo vívida que resulta la persona representada, no es más que un objeto que lleva siglos colgado de esta pared.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The portrait remains silent. Perhaps because, despite the vividness of the person depicted, it is only an object that has been hanging on this wall for centuries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El retrato guarda silencio. Probablemente porque, a pesar de lo vívida que resulta la persona representada, no es más que un objeto que lleva siglos colgado de esta pared.{/n}

languages.text: {n}肖像静默无声。或许是因为，尽管画中人物栩栩如生，但它终究只是一个在这面墙上悬挂了几个世纪的物件。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The portrait remains silent. Perhaps because, despite the vividness of the person depicted, it is only an object that has been hanging on this wall for centuries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}肖像静默无声。或许是因为，尽管画中人物栩栩如生，但它终究只是一个在这面墙上悬挂了几个世纪的物件。{/n}
